summary: Iteration 49 - Avatar Studio 4 Bug Fixes Testing. All backend tests passed (17/17). Frontend code verified for all 4 bug fixes: 1) Avatar preview portrait dimensions (w-44 max-h-[280px]), 2) Backend ANGLE_MAP has distinct left_profile vs right_profile prompts, 3) Clothing gallery shows when >1 variants with instant selection from cache, 4) startRecording with proper error handling and MIME type detection.

BUG_FIX_1_avatar_preview_portrait.change: Changed from h-40 w-40 (square) to w-44 max-h-[280px] (portrait/rectangular)
BUG_FIX_1_avatar_preview_portrait.test_result: Code verified - className='w-44 max-h-[280px] rounded-2xl object-cover'

BUG_FIX_2_angle_distinct_prompts.change: ANGLE_MAP now has distinct prompts: left_profile='body and face turned to THEIR LEFT, showing LEFT side...' vs right_profile='body and face turned to THEIR RIGHT, showing RIGHT side...'
BUG_FIX_2_angle_distinct_prompts.test_result: Backend tests passed - all 4 angles (front, left_profile, right_profile, back) accepted

FEATURE_3_clothing_gallery.change: Gallery shows when Object.keys(clothingVariants).length > 1, displays thumbnails for each generated style
FEATURE_3_clothing_gallery.test_result: Code verified - gallery renders with clickable thumbnails

FEATURE_4_instant_clothing_selection.change: applyClothing checks if clothingVariants[style] exists before API call, instant selection if cached
FEATURE_4_instant_clothing_selection.test_result: Code verified - if(clothingVariants[style]) returns immediately without API call

FEATURE_5_clothing_avatar_ready_indicato.change: Shows 'Avatar ready' green text when clothingVariants[style.id] exists

changes: Detects best MIME type (audio/webm;codecs=opus, audio/webm, audio/mp4)
BUG_FIX_6_microphone_recording.test_result: Code verified - proper error handling implemented

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration49_avatar_studio_bugfixes.py - Created new test file for iteration 49 bug fixes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 bug fixes verified in code, UI tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Test avatars injected via localStorage for UI verification

Route: /marketing/studio. Backend tests in test_iteration49_avatar_studio_bugfixes.py.
